events.event_description: First U.S. Diplomatic Agent to Bulgaria presents credentials, establishing a liaison-level presence.

evidence.quote: John Brinkerhoff Jackson, Diplomatic Agent. Appointed: 1903-06-05. Credentials presented: 1903-09-19.

events.event_description: U.S. mission elevated to Legation level as Jackson is commissioned Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary and presents credentials.

evidence.quote: John Brinkerhoff Jackson, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1911-08-12. Credentials presented: 1912-02-01.

events.event_description: Bulgaria declared war on the United States, ending formal diplomatic relations and closing the mission.

evidence.quote: Bulgaria declared war on the United States on 1941-12-13. Note: Earle left post late in December 1941, arriving at Istanbul (en route to the United States) on December 27, 1941.

events.event_description: U.S. Legation in Sofia re-established after WWII break, with a Chargé d'Affaires ad interim presenting credentials.

evidence.quote: John Evarts Horner, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. Credentials presented: 1947-09-27.

events.event_description: The Department of State announced the suspension of diplomatic relations with Bulgaria; Heath left post on February 24, 1950.

evidence.quote: The Department of State announced the suspension of diplomatic relatoins with Bulgaria on February 21, 1950. Heath left post on February 24, 1950.

events.event_description: U.S. Legation in Sofia re-established after suspension of relations, with Edward Page presenting credentials as Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary.

evidence.quote: Edward Page, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1959-11-23. Credentials presented: 1960-03-14.

events.event_description: Legation Sofia raised to Embassy status on November 28, 1966, with McSweeney in charge pending his promotion to Ambassador.

evidence.quote: Note: Legation Sofia was raised to Embassy status on November 28, 1966, with McSweeney in charge pending his promotion to the rank of Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary.
